issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but the DSL is missing the activation context '[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn]'. The card requires tracking activation restrictions.

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The effect trashes from deck (top of deck), not hand. Should be 'ForceDiscard' with source specification, or a custom 'TrashFromDeck' action. 'TrashFromHand' alias for 'ForceDiscard' applies only to hand discards.

The conditional 'Then, if your deck has 0 cards, set up to 1 of your Characters as active' is missing. Requires a condition check (TrashCount or equivalent deck state) followed by a Rest action to set a Character active.
Count is 4, which matches 'Trash 4 cards', but there is no source specification indicating these are from the top of the deck, not the hand.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Trash 4 cards from the top of your deck. Then, if your deck has 0 cards, set up to 1 of your Characters as active.
